name: Orbit Rush 3D
description: You are the ball in Orbit Rush 3D. The tunnel rotates around you. Dodge incoming obstacle rings rushing from the darkness, pass through the gaps and survive as long as you can! Collect gems and special power-ups: 2 to double your score, to turn invincible and smash through obstacles, to slow down time. 10 unlockable skins, 11 achievements, ever-increasing speed and a dynamic soundtrack. How far can you go?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
